hooks.command: $d = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $d.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -like '*demand-radar*' -and $fp -notlike '*CONTEXT.md*') { $msg = @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PostToolUse'; additionalContext = 'Reminder: please update CONTEXT.md — move completed tasks to done, update in-progress and next steps.' } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $msg }
